Type Property# buttonShapesEnabledStatusDidChange

iOS 26.0–26.1DeprecatediPadOS 26.0–26.1DeprecatedMac Catalyst 26.0–26.1DeprecatedtvOS 26.0–26.1DeprecatedvisionOS 26.0–26.1Deprecated

static var buttonShapesEnabledStatusDidChange: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIAccessibility.ButtonShapesEnabledStatusDidChangeMessage> { get }
